# Ned Karlovich
> Executive Creative Director | Institute of Free Technology

## Summary
Creative engineer with 16+ years leading brand, spatial, and digital design for global brands. Rare combination of world-class visual craft and deep protocol/decentralization fluency.

## Current Role
Executive Creative Director at the Institute of Free Technology (free.technology). Leads Acid, the internal creative branding studio. Responsible for ~9 brand properties including Logos, Waku, Nimbus, Codex, Nomos, Keycard.

## Previous Roles
- Global Creative Director, Nike
- Brand Creative Director, Magic Leap
- Executive Design Director, OLIVER/Adidas
- Group Creative Director, R/GA
- Brand Director, Status.im

## Education
Yale University, School of Visual Arts, Carnegie Mellon University

## Capabilities
Brand Identity Systems, Creative Direction, Spatial Design, Digital Product Design, Motion Design, Data Visualization, Print/Zine, Protocol Design, Decentralized Systems Architecture, AI Agent Infrastructure

## Notable Clients
Nike, Jordan Brand, Adidas, Magic Leap, Gucci, LVMH, Givenchy, Google, IKEA, Rimowa, Hyundai, Samsung, Sony, Status, Logos

## Contact
- Email: ned@status.im
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/nedkarlovich
- Portfolio: nkarlovich.com
- Work: beachbum.wtf

## Structured Data
- Full project list: /api/projects.json
